name: R.E.P.O.

artwork.alt: R.E.P.O. official header art showing robot scavengers in a haunted industrial facility.

bestFor: Groups that want loud, failure-driven co-op with visible mistakes and recovery moments.
shortPitch: Physics-heavy co-op horror built around panic, extraction, and funny failures.

name: Lethal Company

artwork.alt: Lethal Company official header art with suited scavengers and a looming creature in a red industrial scene.

bestFor: Small groups that enjoy tension, communication mistakes, and strong atmosphere.
shortPitch: A salvage horror game where proximity voice chat and teamwork drive the tension.

name: Content Warning

artwork.alt: Content Warning official header art with masked creators filming monsters under neon light.

bestFor: Friend groups that want shareable chaos and fast rounds without oppressive horror.
shortPitch: A co-op horror game with social chaos, slapstick failures, and strong streaming energy.

name: Murky Divers

artwork.alt: Murky Divers official header art showing divers, a submersible, and underwater recovery chaos.

bestFor: Larger groups that want co-op pressure and messy teamwork without relying on voice systems.
shortPitch: An underwater co-op cleanup game built on pressure, coordination, and messy team fails.

name: PEAK

artwork.alt: PEAK official header art with colorful climbers hanging from a steep mountain face.

bestFor: Players who want hilarious co-op mistakes without leaning on horror tropes.
shortPitch: A co-op climbing game powered by timing, mistakes, and hilarious collapses.

name: PANICORE

artwork.alt: PANICORE official header art showing a terrified group fleeing through a dark abandoned interior.

bestFor: Groups that want short, high-tension runs where noise discipline matters.
shortPitch: A stealth-first co-op horror game where communication and noise control matter.

name: Phasmophobia

artwork.alt: Phasmophobia official header art with paranormal investigators approaching a haunted house.

bestFor: Players willing to learn deeper systems and stick with a longer progression curve.
shortPitch: A co-op ghost investigation game with strong voice features and long-term progression.

name: Escape the Backrooms

artwork.alt: Escape the Backrooms official header art with players trapped in a yellow liminal corridor.

bestFor: Groups that want environmental dread and cooperative puzzle-solving over slapstick chaos.
shortPitch: A co-op horror escape experience focused on exploration, puzzle pressure, and environmental dread.
